title: 1981-04-16_Pat_121.txt
key_claims: The Gnostic prison operates by forcing us into "endless horizontal tracking"—reliving the same life repeatedly while wiping our memories so we think time is passing and things are changing. Ignorance is the primary mechanism of our enslavement.
The year 1945 marked a victory for the Forces of Light, and "the 5th savior" (Maitreya) has now been transplanted into the world to break us out of the maze.
*The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch* was a predictive vision: Palmer Eldritch is the evil Demiurge (Yaldabaoth) maintaining the delusion.
The "pulley" vision and anamnesis (remembering) represent vertical escape into the 5D universe, contrasting with the counterfeit 4D horizontal tracking.
recurring_concepts: **Spurious Time**: The concept that true time stopped in the 1st Century CE (the Book of Acts) and we have been trapped in a repeating time-loop ever since, a counterfeit reality maintained by the Empire.
reading_excerpt: The Gnostic prison operates by forcing us into "endless horizontal tracking"—reliving the same life repeatedly while wiping our memories so we think time is passing and things are changing. Ignorance is the primary mechanism of our enslavement.
